productDisplayName: FILA Men Redefine Black Sports Shoes
description: The Redefine from fila has been designed to support the foot with an enduring Fit for people who work-out. This shoe has been designed to guide the foot in a natural way from its first landing to take off. Upper Mesh upper with synthetic overlays for structure and breathability Synthetic rubber casing from the forefoot to the lacing system for structure Central lacing system for customised, comfortable fit Lushly padded tongue and mesh collar for snug fit Carbon rubber outsole extended and embedded onto the toe box Soft, cushioned footbed for all day step-in comfort Removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic Midsole Full-length midsole for lightweight durability Outsole Scooped heel cup for cushioning Curved midfoot Multidirectional lugs all over Shoe care Do not machine wash Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Store away from direct sunlight
